summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard as independent PR work, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned because the job disables those paths. Security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined only for their exact refs; unrelated PRs are kept open for normal maintainer or author follow-up.
